---
name: Quality Report
about: Report a skill that produced poor or unusable output
title: "[QUALITY] skill-name-here"
labels: quality
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Name
Which skill produced the problem? (e.g. `hook-generator`, `pitch-treatment-writer`)

## Input You Used
Paste the exact input you gave Claude when using this skill. This is essential for reproducing the problem.

```
[paste your input here]
```

## Output You Received
Paste the output Claude produced. If it's very long, include the most relevant sections.

```
[paste the output here]
```

## What Was Wrong
Describe specifically what the problem was. Examples:
- Output was too generic and could apply to any topic
- Key required information from the input was ignored
- Wrong format — output was structured as X but should be Y
- Factual errors or invented details
- Tone was wrong for professional use

## What A Good Output Would Look Like
Describe (or draft) what the output should have been. The more specific, the more useful this is for improving the skill.

## Severity
- [ ] Minor — output was usable but needed significant editing
- [ ] Moderate — output was not usable, had to start over
- [ ] Blocking — skill consistently fails for this type of input

## Skill Status At Time Of Report
What badge did the skill show when you used it? (planned / draft / beta / stable)
